items.title: So I lost half of my Hololive oshi...
items.author: Linsaloty
items.content:
<article>To those who reached out, thank you I appreciate it! Give your nearby Shiokko love if you see them at EXPO/Fes!

Also watching back I sound so sad haha. Don’t worry I am fine!(End of the day so my energy was drained!) As hard as it is, I’m genuinely happy for Shion that she was able to make the best choice herself. I do wish her the very best in whatever she pursues! Maybe we will get more Aqushio or Shioshachi if she ever decides to reincarnate!

Like everyone always says, treasure your time you have with your oshi cause you may never know when it will end!

Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty

▼Related Videos▼
Gomen Medicine MV: https://youtu.be/eKA6dewIdk8?si=OgIPcral-gVdf1zG
Cinderella Magic MV: https://youtu.be/IdgsvGvm_Fc?si=dN06hyQEQ3Ejorws

Timestamps
0:00 - My oshi situations in 2024
4:00 - Shion
8:54 - Thoughts on Hololive/Cover
13:25 - My updated oshi rankings
16:59 - Final thoughts</article>
